descriptionText: Riva Aquamare For Sale 2018| Guest Cabins:1 | Crew Cabins:1 PRICE:800,000 $The Riva Aquamare For Sale 2018 offers an appealing opportunity for anyone seeking a stylish day cruiser with a strong sense of heritage and a practical layout for enjoyable time on the water. This 2018 model is presented in good condition and remains a clear representation of Riva’s approach to craftsmanship, blending traditional design influences with modern engineering. Positioned in China, she is ready to be viewed by buyers looking for a compact yet refined motor yacht.Yacht Main Specifications: • Brand: Riva • Year: 2018 • Length: 11.8 m • Max Beam: 3.5 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 1.1 m • Yacht Location: China • Max Speed: 40 knots • Fuel Tank: 1,000 l • Guest Cabins: 1 • Crew Cabins: 1 • Water Tank: 330 l • Engines: Volvo Penta D6 400The Riva Aquamare For Sale 2018, also known as the Rivamare, carries forward the distinctive character that has made the Riva brand recognisable for decades. Her profile is defined by smooth, continuous lines and a gentle curvature that gives her a timeless appearance. While the overall length of 11.8 metres places her comfortably in the day‑boat category, the level of detail in her construction and finishes reflects the same philosophy found in Riva’s larger yachts. Owners often note that she feels elegant without being overly ornate, offering a balance between style and functionality.Powered by a Volvo Penta D6 400 engine, the yacht is capable of reaching speeds up to 40 knots. This combination of speed and handling makes her well‑suited for coastal cruising, weekend getaways, or simply spending a day anchored in a quiet bay. The hull is constructed in FRP, providing reliability and ease of maintenance, both of which contribute to her present good condition. The draught of 1.1 metres also allows access to shallower areas, increasing flexibility in route planning.On deck, the layout focuses on comfort and ease of use. The aft sunpad, shaded seating, and well‑positioned helm create a natural flow for guests moving around the boat. Storage is efficiently integrated, ensuring that essential equipment is kept out of the way without taking up valuable space. The cockpit design encourages relaxed social moments, with seating areas that feel open while still providing a sense of security while underway.Below deck, the yacht offers a compact but carefully considered interior. The guest cabin provides the essentials needed for overnight stays, making the yacht suitable for short cruising trips. The craftsmanship in the interior reflects Riva’s approach to practicality and aesthetics, using quality materials that have held up well over the years. There is also a crew cabin, which, despite the yacht’s size, adds flexibility for owners who prefer assistance with operation or care.The Riva Aquamare For Sale 2018 remains a strong option for buyers who appreciate the legacy of the Riva brand and the lifestyle associated with it. Her good condition, reliable performance, and refined appearance make her a versatile choice for leisure boating. Whether used for day trips, coastal cruising, or as a tender to a larger yacht, she continues to carry forward Carlo Riva’s vision of creating boats with lasting beauty and purpose.
descriptionHtml:
Riva Aquamare For Sale 2018| Guest Cabins:1 | Crew Cabins:1
PRICE:800,000 $

The Riva Aquamare For Sale 2018 offers an appealing opportunity for anyone seeking a stylish day cruiser with a strong sense of heritage and a practical layout for enjoyable time on the water. This 2018 model is presented in good condition and remains a clear representation of Riva’s approach to craftsmanship, blending traditional design influences with modern engineering. Positioned in China, she is ready to be viewed by buyers looking for a compact yet refined motor yacht.

Yacht Main Specifications:
• Brand: Riva
• Year: 2018
• Length: 11.8 m
• Max Beam: 3.5 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 1.1 m
• Yacht Location: China
• Max Speed: 40 knots
• Fuel Tank: 1,000 l
• Guest Cabins: 1
• Crew Cabins: 1
• Water Tank: 330 l
• Engines: Volvo Penta D6 400

The Riva Aquamare For Sale 2018, also known as the Rivamare, carries forward the distinctive character that has made the Riva brand recognisable for decades. Her profile is defined by smooth, continuous lines and a gentle curvature that gives her a timeless appearance. While the overall length of 11.8 metres places her comfortably in the day‑boat category, the level of detail in her construction and finishes reflects the same philosophy found in Riva’s larger yachts. Owners often note that she feels elegant without being overly ornate, offering a balance between style and functionality.

Powered by a Volvo Penta D6 400 engine, the yacht is capable of reaching speeds up to 40 knots. This combination of speed and handling makes her well‑suited for coastal cruising, weekend getaways, or simply spending a day anchored in a quiet bay. The hull is constructed in FRP, providing reliability and ease of maintenance, both of which contribute to her present good condition. The draught of 1.1 metres also allows access to shallower areas, increasing flexibility in route planning.

On deck, the layout focuses on comfort and ease of use. The aft sunpad, shaded seating, and well‑positioned helm create a natural flow for guests moving around the boat. Storage is efficiently integrated, ensuring that essential equipment is kept out of the way without taking up valuable space. The cockpit design encourages relaxed social moments, with seating areas that feel open while still providing a sense of security while underway.

Below deck, the yacht offers a compact but carefully considered interior. The guest cabin provides the essentials needed for overnight stays, making the yacht suitable for short cruising trips. The craftsmanship in the interior reflects Riva’s approach to practicality and aesthetics, using quality materials that have held up well over the years. There is also a crew cabin, which, despite the yacht’s size, adds flexibility for owners who prefer assistance with operation or care.

The Riva Aquamare For Sale 2018 remains a strong option for buyers who appreciate the legacy of the Riva brand and the lifestyle associated with it. Her good condition, reliable performance, and refined appearance make her a versatile choice for leisure boating. Whether used for day trips, coastal cruising, or as a tender to a larger yacht, she continues to carry forward Carlo Riva’s vision of creating boats with lasting beauty and purpose.
